message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on friday and should arrive by 16:30
The train should depart from kings lynn and should go to cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 8 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the north
The hotel should include free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 5 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
